mapper.insert: INSERT INTO logdb.event_log (character_id, character_name, event_type, value1, date) VALUES (#{characterId}, #{characterName}, 8, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)

INSERT INTO logdb.event_log (character_id, character_name, event_type, value1, value2, value3, value4, date) VALUES (#{characterId}, #{characterName}, #{eventType}, #{value1}, #{value2}, #{value3}, #{value4}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
